overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The journey begins at a busy intersection with digital billboards, continues under elevated highways, through narrow alleys, and along a multi-lane highway with visible smoke plumes rising from industrial structures.

events.description: blue sports car drives through the intersection from left to right
player begins crossing the street from right to left

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then proceeding to cross the multi-lane intersection

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving through the intersection
pedestrian in white tank top and cap walking across the crosswalk

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt
large vertical digital advertisement displaying a red and blue oni demon mask with Japanese text
tall digital screen showing a woman's face with red styling
elevated highway structure with large ventilation fans overhead
blue painted pole with traffic signals

segments.scene_description: The player stands at a futuristic city intersection with large digital billboards displaying a demon mask advertisement. After a blue sports car passes, the player crosses the white-striped crosswalk while a pedestrian in a white tank top walks in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: steps onto sidewalk and enters the covered area beneath the elevated highway
lighting becomes darker as moving deeper under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete pedestrian walkway with white tactile paving strips under overhead structure
futuristic kiosk with glowing advertisements and digital displays
chain-link fence with green covering along the right side
massive concrete columns supporting the elevated highway above
white painted graffiti art on dark building walls

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a covered sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, passing concrete support pillars and a futuristic newsstand. The lighting shifts to a darker, mixed artificial and natural light as the character moves deeper under the overpass, with graffiti visible on the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley transitioning to highway overlook

events.description: turns right into a narrow alleyway with construction barriers
emerges from dark alley into bright sunlight with open sky visible
large black smoke plume becomes visible rising from industrial structure ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow alley and emerging to an open highway view

entered.detail: construction barrier with red and white horizontal stripes and barbed wire on top
plastic yellow construction barricade in front of the barrier
dark narrow passage between tall buildings with closed shutters
thick black smoke rising from a structure in the distance
concrete wall with large 'EL PADRE' graffiti text and colorful murals
multi-level highway interchange with metal framework

segments.scene_description: The player turns into a narrow service alley marked by red and white construction barriers, passing through a dimly lit corridor. Upon emerging, the scene opens to a bright highway overlook where a massive plume of black smoke rises from an industrial structure, with 'EL PADRE' graffiti visible on the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway promenade with industrial smokestack view

events.description: slight turn to follow the curved highway barrier

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated sidewalk next to a busy multi-lane highway with smoke visible ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking ahead along the sidewalk

entered.detail: metal railing separating sidewalk from the multi-lane highway below
industrial structure emitting thick black smoke into the sky
multi-level highway system with vehicles moving at high speed
large green digital advertisement with red sunburst design
tall palm trees lining the street
metal walkway bridge crossing over the highway
large digital screen displaying 'TECHTRONIKA' text and product advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player walks along an elevated promenade beside a busy multi-lane highway, with a massive smoke stack billowing black smoke directly ahead. Palm trees and large digital billboards including one for 'TECHTRONIKA' line the route, while a pedestrian bridge spans the highway in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit city intersection into a gritty industrial highway corridor. It begins at a busy crossing dominated by digital billboards of a demon mask, moving past a blue sports car and a pedestrian in a white tank top. As the camera advances, the scene shifts into the shadow of a massive elevated highway, passing concrete pillars and a futuristic newsstand while the lighting dims and graffiti appears on the walls. The path then narrows into a dimly lit service alley marked by construction barriers before suddenly opening onto a bright overlook where a massive plume of black smoke rises from an industrial structure. Finally, the movement continues along an elevated promenade lined with palm trees and Techtronika billboards, heading directly toward a billowing smoke stack and a distant pedestrian bridge.
